name: citedy-seo-agent
description: Connect Cursor to Citedy's AI SEO platform via MCP. Scout trends on X/Reddit, analyze competitors, generate SEO articles in 55 languages with AI illustrations and voice-over, create social adaptations for 9 platforms, generate AI UGC viral videos with subtitles, ingest any URL into structured content, create lead magnets, and run fully automated content autopilot.
